Generated Narrative: SearchParameter as-sp-organization-period

AsOrganiationPeriodSearchParameter

Parameter period:date

Paramètre de recherche pour récupérer une organisation par période d'activité

ResourceOrganization
Expressionaddress.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/organization-period').value
Multiples
  • multipleAnd: It's up to the server whether the parameter may repeat in order to specify multiple values that must all be true
  • multipleOr: It's up to the server whether the parameter can have multiple values (separated by comma) where at least one must be true
